title: gleichenia pedalis
intro: Gleichenia pedalis, also known as the walking fern or rock fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Gleicheniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gleichenia pedalis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, or as a decoction by boiling the roots in water, to make use of its medicinal properties.
